info.title: EM Furniture & Interior API
info.description: REST API for EM Furniture and Interior e-commerce platform. Supports user and guest authentication, product/collection management, orders, payments (Paystack, Flutterwave, Stripe, bank transfer), consultations, loyalty, marketing, and admin operations.

200.description: Reset link sent if account exists
Guest session data with populated cart and wishlist

get.summary: Get products with filters and pagination
Get collections with filters and pagination
